items.title: Is McDonald's (MCD) Price Justified After Strong Multi Year Share Gains?
items.description: If you are wondering whether McDonald's stock still offers value at current levels, this article will walk through what the numbers actually say about its price. The share price most recently closed at US$327.16, with returns of 3.9% over 7 days, 6.5% over 30 days, 7.9% year to date, 13.8% over 1 year, 33.6% over 3 years and 71.4% over 5 years. Recent attention on McDonald's has focused on how the brand is positioning itself within global quick service dining and on ongoing discussions...

items.title: McDonald's: Getting Ready For The Next Cash Flow Test
Jobs, Consumer Prices, Coca-Cola, CVS, Ford, McDonald’s, and More to Watch This Week
items.description: The Federal Reserve’s dual mandate will be covered this week with the release of the January jobs report and the consumer price index. Plus, earnings from Cisco Systems, Applied Materials, Arista, and many more.

items.title: Inflation, Earnings and Other Key Things to Watch this Week
items.description: Markets face a critical week featuring an unusual mid-week jobs report Wednesday at 8:30am alongside Friday's January CPI data, creating a compressed economic data schedule that will test whether recent inflation concerns are justified or if price pressures are finally moderating.

items.title: Dow 50,000 sets table for inflation data, delayed January jobs report: What to watch this week
items.description: As investors turn toward the coming week, Wall Street will look to build on Friday's sharp turnaround into the green as investors process the drastic software and crypto sell-off.
